instruction: Create a quest data table. Each quest has: name, description, giver NPC, required level, XP reward, gold reward, and quest type as Main or Side.
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_Quests
STRUCT: FQuestInfo

COLUMN QuestName: String
COLUMN Description: Text
COLUMN GiverNPC: String
COLUMN RequiredLevel: Int = 1
COLUMN XPReward: Int
COLUMN GoldReward: Int
COLUMN QuestType: String = "Side"

ROW SlayGoblins: "Slay the Goblins", "Defeat 10 goblins in the forest", "Captain", 3, 200, 100, "Main"
ROW FindHerb: "Rare Herb", "Collect a rare herb from the mountain", "Healer", 1, 50, 25, "Side"
ROW EscortMerchant: "Safe Passage", "Escort the merchant to the city", "Merchant", 5, 300, 200, "Main"
actual_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_Quests
STRUCT: FQuestInfo

COLUMN QuestName: String
COLUMN Description: Text
COLUMN GiverNPC: String
COLUMN RequiredLevel: Int = 1
COLUMN XPReward: Int
COLUMN GoldReward: Int
COLUMN QuestType: String = "Side"

ROW SlayGoblins: "Slay the Goblins", "Defeat 10 goblins in the forest", "Captain", 3, 200, 100, "Main"
ROW FindHerb: "Rare Herb", "Collect a rare herb from the mountain", "Healer", 1, 50, 25, "Side"
ROW EscortMerchant: "Safe Passage", "Escort the merchant to the city", "Merchant", 2, 150, 50, "Side"
raw_output:
DATATABLE: DT_Quests
STRUCT: FQuestInfo

COLUMN QuestName: String
COLUMN Description: Text
COLUMN GiverNPC: String
COLUMN RequiredLevel: Int = 1
COLUMN XPReward: Int
COLUMN GoldReward: Int
COLUMN QuestType: String = "Side"

ROW SlayGoblins: "Slay the Goblins", "Defeat 10 goblins in the forest", "Captain", 3, 200, 100, "Main"
ROW FindHerb: "Rare Herb", "Collect a rare herb from the mountain", "Healer", 1, 50, 25, "Side"
ROW EscortMerchant: "Safe Passage", "Escort the merchant to the city", "Merchant", 2, 150, 50, "Side"

missing_lines: ROW EscortMerchant: "Safe Passage", "Escort the merchant to the city", "Merchant", 5, 300, 200, "Main"
extra_lines: ROW EscortMerchant: "Safe Passage", "Escort the merchant to the city", "Merchant", 2, 150, 50, "Side"
missing_rows: ROW EscortMerchant: "Safe Passage", "Escort the merchant to the city", "Merchant", 5, 300, 200, "Main"

instruction: Make a table of quest objectives. Columns: objective ID, parent quest name, task description, type (Kill, Collect, Explore, Talk), target name, target count, and is optional boolean.
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_QuestObjectives
STRUCT: FObjective

COLUMN ObjectiveID: String
COLUMN ParentQuest: String
COLUMN TaskDescription: Text
COLUMN ObjectiveType: String
COLUMN TargetName: String
COLUMN TargetCount: Int = 1
COLUMN IsOptional: Bool = false

ROW Obj1: "KillGoblins", "SlayGoblins", "Defeat 10 goblins", "Kill", "Goblin", 10, false
ROW Obj2: "FindBoss", "SlayGoblins", "Find the goblin chief", "Explore", "GoblinCamp", 1, false
ROW Obj3: "BonusLoot", "SlayGoblins", "Find hidden chest", "Explore", "HiddenChest", 1, true
actual_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_QuestObjectives
STRUCT: FObjectiveData

COLUMN ObjectiveID: String
COLUMN ParentQuest: String
COLUMN TaskDescription: Text
COLUMN Type: String
COLUMN TargetName: String
COLUMN TargetCount: Int = 1
COLUMN IsOptional: Bool = false

ROW Obj1: "KillGoblins", "Dragon Slayer", "Defeat 10 goblins", "Kill", "Goblin", 10, false
ROW Obj2: "FindCave", "Dragon Slayer", "Find the dragon cave", "Explore", "Dragon Cave", 1, false
ROW Obj3: "BonusLoot", "Dragon Slayer", "Collect hidden treasure", "Collect", "Treasure Chest", 1, true
ROW Obj4: "TalkElder", "Dragon Slayer", "Report to the Elder", "Talk", "Elder", 1, false
raw_output:
DATATABLE: DT_QuestObjectives
STRUCT: FObjectiveData

COLUMN ObjectiveID: String
COLUMN ParentQuest: String
COLUMN TaskDescription: Text
COLUMN Type: String
COLUMN TargetName: String
COLUMN TargetCount: Int = 1
COLUMN IsOptional: Bool = false

ROW Obj1: "KillGoblins", "Dragon Slayer", "Defeat 10 goblins", "Kill", "Goblin", 10, false
ROW Obj2: "FindCave", "Dragon Slayer", "Find the dragon cave", "Explore", "Dragon Cave", 1, false
ROW Obj3: "BonusLoot", "Dragon Slayer", "Collect hidden treasure", "Collect", "Treasure Chest", 1, true
ROW Obj4: "TalkElder", "Dragon Slayer", "Report to the Elder", "Talk", "Elder", 1, false

missing_lines: ROW Obj2: "FindBoss", "SlayGoblins", "Find the goblin chief", "Explore", "GoblinCamp", 1, false
extra_lines: ROW Obj2: "FindCave", "Dragon Slayer", "Find the dragon cave", "Explore", "Dragon Cave", 1, false
ROW Obj3: "BonusLoot", "Dragon Slayer", "Collect hidden treasure", "Collect", "Treasure Chest", 1, true
ROW Obj4: "TalkElder", "Dragon Slayer", "Report to the Elder", "Talk", "Elder", 1, false
missing_rows: ROW Obj2: "FindBoss", "SlayGoblins", "Find the goblin chief", "Explore", "GoblinCamp", 1, false

instruction: Build a daily quest table. Each daily quest has: quest name, description, reset time in hours as a float, reward type as a string, reward amount as an integer, and minimum player level.
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_Dailies
STRUCT: FDailyQuest

COLUMN QuestName: String
COLUMN Description: Text
COLUMN ResetHours: Float = 24.0
COLUMN RewardType: String
COLUMN RewardAmount: Int
COLUMN MinLevel: Int = 1

ROW GatherWood: "Woodcutter", "Gather 20 wood", 24.0, "Gold", 50, 1
ROW KillBandits: "Bandit Hunter", "Defeat 5 bandits", 24.0, "XP", 100, 3
ROW DeliverMail: "Postal Service", "Deliver 3 letters", 12.0, "Gold", 30, 1
actual_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_Dailies
STRUCT: FDailyQuest

COLUMN QuestName: String
COLUMN Description: Text
COLUMN ResetHours: Float = 24.0
COLUMN RewardType: String
COLUMN RewardAmount: Int
COLUMN MinLevel: Int = 1

ROW GatherWood: "Woodcutter", "Gather 20 wood", 24.0, "Gold", 50, 1
ROW KillBandits: "Bandit Hunter", "Defeat 5 bandits", 24.0, "XP", 100, 3
ROW DeliverMail: "Postal Service", "Deliver 3 letters", 12.0, "Gold", 30, 1
raw_output:
DATATABLE: DT_Dailies

COLUMN QuestName: String
COLUMN Description: Text

COLUMN RewardAmount: Int
COLUMN MinLevel: Int = 1

ROW KillBandits: "Bandit Hunter", "Defeat 5 bandits", 24.0, "XP", 100, 3
ROW DeliverMail: "Postal Service", "Deliver 3 letters", 12.0, "Gold", 30, 1

instruction: Create a skill tree table. Each skill needs: name, description, tier number, prerequisite skill name (empty if none), mana cost, cooldown, and damage.
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_Skills
STRUCT: FSkillEntry

COLUMN SkillName: String
COLUMN Description: Text
COLUMN Tier: Int
COLUMN Prerequisite: String = ""
COLUMN ManaCost: Float
COLUMN Cooldown: Float
COLUMN Damage: Float = 0.0

ROW Strike: "Strike", "Basic melee attack", 1, "", 0.0, 1.0, 15.0
ROW PowerStrike: "Power Strike", "Stronger melee hit", 2, "Strike", 10.0, 3.0, 30.0
ROW Fireball: "Fireball", "Ranged fire attack", 1, "", 25.0, 4.0, 40.0
ROW Inferno: "Inferno", "Area fire damage", 3, "Fireball", 50.0, 10.0, 60.0
actual_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_SkillTree
STRUCT: FSkillNode

COLUMN SkillName: String
COLUMN Description: Text
COLUMN Tier: Int
COLUMN Prerequisite: String = ""
COLUMN ManaCost: Float = 0.0
COLUMN Cooldown: Float = 1.0
COLUMN Damage: Float = 0.0

ROW BasicSlash: "Basic Slash", "A simple sword strike", 1, "", 0.0, 1.0, 10.0
ROW PowerSlash: "Power Slash", "A stronger sword strike", 2, "BasicSlash", 15.0, 3.0, 25.0
ROW Fireball: "Fireball", "Launches a fireball", 1, "", 25.0, 4.0, 30.0
ROW Inferno: "Inferno", "Creates a fire storm", 3, "Fireball", 50.0, 10.0, 40.0
ROW UltimateSlash: "Ultimate Slash", "Devastating sword attack", 3, "PowerSlash", 100.0, 20.0, 200.0
raw_output:
DATATABLE: DT_SkillTree
STRUCT: FSkillNode

COLUMN SkillName: String
COLUMN Description: Text
COLUMN Tier: Int
COLUMN Prerequisite: String = ""
COLUMN ManaCost: Float = 0.0
COLUMN Cooldown: Float = 1.0
COLUMN Damage: Float = 0.0

ROW BasicSlash: "Basic Slash", "A simple sword strike", 1, "", 0.0, 1.0, 10.0
ROW PowerSlash: "Power Slash", "A stronger sword strike", 2, "BasicSlash", 15.0, 3.0, 25.0
ROW Fireball: "Fireball", "Launches a fireball", 1, "", 25.0, 4.0, 30.0
ROW Inferno: "Inferno", "Creates a fire storm", 3, "Fireball", 50.0, 10.0, 40.0
ROW UltimateSlash: "Ultimate Slash", "Devastating sword attack", 3, "PowerSlash", 100.0, 20.0, 200.0

extra_lines: ROW BasicSlash: "Basic Slash", "A simple sword strike", 1, "", 0.0, 1.0, 10.0
ROW PowerSlash: "Power Slash", "A stronger sword strike", 2, "BasicSlash", 15.0, 3.0, 25.0

STRUCT: FTalentEntry

COLUMN TalentName: String
COLUMN Branch: String
COLUMN Tier: Int
COLUMN EffectDescription: Text

COLUMN MaxRank: Int = 1

ROW SharpBlades: "Sharp Blades", "Offense", 1, "Increases melee damage", 5.0, 3
ROW ThickArmor: "Thick Armor", "Defense", 1, "Reduces damage taken", 3.0, 5
ROW QuickFeet: "Quick Feet", "Utility", 1, "Increases move speed", 10.0, 3
ROW Execute: "Execute", "Offense", 3, "Instant kill below threshold", 15.0, 1
ROW Meditate: "Meditate", "Utility", 2, "Regenerate mana over time", 2.0, 3

instruction: Create an ability unlock table for a progression system. Each ability has: name, unlock level as integer, ability type (Active, Passive, Ultimate), description, cooldown seconds, and resource cost.
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_AbilityUnlocks
STRUCT: FAbilityUnlock

COLUMN AbilityName: String
COLUMN UnlockLevel: Int
COLUMN AbilityType: String = "Active"
COLUMN Description: Text
COLUMN Cooldown: Float = 1.0
COLUMN ResourceCost: Float = 0.0

ROW Slash: "Slash", 1, "Active", "Quick sword attack", 1.0, 0.0
ROW DodgeRoll: "Dodge Roll", 3, "Active", "Quick dodge", 2.0, 10.0
ROW CritBoost: "Critical Boost", 5, "Passive", "Increased crit chance", 0.0, 0.0
ROW Earthquake: "Earthquake", 10, "Ultimate", "Massive area damage", 30.0, 100.0

instruction: Create an audio configuration table. Columns: event name, volume from 0 to 1, pitch, max audible distance, whether it loops, and its category like SFX or Music.
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_AudioConfig
STRUCT: FAudioEntry

COLUMN EventName: String
COLUMN Volume: Float = 1.0
COLUMN Pitch: Float = 1.0
COLUMN MaxDistance: Float = 2000.0
COLUMN IsLooping: Bool = false
COLUMN Category: String = "SFX"

ROW Footstep: "Footstep", 0.6, 1.0, 500.0, false, "SFX"
ROW Explosion: "Explosion", 1.0, 0.8, 5000.0, false, "SFX"
ROW AmbientWind: "Wind", 0.3, 1.0, 3000.0, true, "Ambient"
ROW BattleMusic: "Battle Theme", 0.7, 1.0, 10000.0, true, "Music"

instruction: Make a sound effects data table for a shooter game. Each sound has: name, volume (float 0-1), pitch multiplier (float), falloff distance (float), priority (integer 0-10), and is 3D (boolean).
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_ShooterSounds
STRUCT: FShooterSound

COLUMN SoundName: String
COLUMN Volume: Float = 1.0
COLUMN Pitch: Float = 1.0
COLUMN FalloffDistance: Float = 2000.0
COLUMN Priority: Int = 5
COLUMN Is3D: Bool = true

ROW Gunshot: "Gunshot", 1.0, 1.0, 3000.0, 8, true
ROW Reload: "Reload", 0.7, 1.0, 500.0, 6, true
ROW Footstep: "Footstep", 0.4, 1.0, 400.0, 3, true
ROW UIClick: "Menu Click", 0.8, 1.2, 0.0, 10, false
ROW Headshot: "Headshot Ding", 0.9, 1.5, 0.0, 9, false

instruction: Create a data table of checkpoint locations for a racing game. Each checkpoint has: checkpoint number, position as a vector, gate width as a float, and whether it is the finish line.
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_RaceCheckpoints
STRUCT: FRaceCheckpoint

COLUMN CheckpointNum: Int
COLUMN Position: Vector
COLUMN GateWidth: Float = 500.0
COLUMN IsFinishLine: Bool = false

ROW CP1: 1, (0,0,0), 600.0, false
ROW CP2: 2, (1000,500,0), 500.0, false
ROW CP3: 3, (2000,1000,50), 500.0, false
ROW Finish: 4, (0,0,0), 800.0, true

COLUMN Position: Vector
COLUMN FacingRotation: Rotator = (0,0,0)

ROW BlueBase: "Blue Base", (5000,0,100), (0,180,0), "Blue", false

ROW BlueRespawn1: "Blue Respawn A", (4500,300,100), (0,135,0), "Blue", true

instruction: Make a status effects table for an RPG. Each effect has: name, duration seconds, damage per second, speed multiplier, is a debuff boolean, and can stack boolean.
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_Effects
STRUCT: FEffectData

COLUMN EffectName: String
COLUMN Duration: Float
COLUMN DamagePerSec: Float = 0.0
COLUMN SpeedMultiplier: Float = 1.0
COLUMN IsDebuff: Bool
COLUMN CanStack: Bool = false

ROW Burn: "Burn", 5.0, 8.0, 1.0, true, true
ROW Freeze: "Freeze", 3.0, 0.0, 0.0, true, false
ROW Haste: "Haste", 10.0, 0.0, 1.5, false, false
ROW Regen: "Regeneration", 8.0, -5.0, 1.0, false, true
actual_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_Effects
STRUCT: FEffectData

COLUMN EffectName: String
COLUMN Duration: Float
COLUMN DPS: Float = 0.0
COLUMN SpeedMultiplier: Float = 1.0
COLUMN IsDebuff: Bool
COLUMN CanStack: Bool = false

ROW Burn: "Burn", 5.0, 8.0, 1.0, true, true
ROW Freeze: "Freeze", 3.0, 0.0, 0.0, true, false
